headline: Equinix (EQIX) Stock Looks Like A Bargain On Cash Flow But Rich On Earnings
summary: Equinix stock has delivered a 37.6% return over the past five years, yet its valuation picture is split, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) estimate pointing to meaningful upside while market multiples suggest the shares already trade on a rich footing. A 37.6% return over five years indicates Equinix has already rewarded patient shareholders, so any further upside case rests on how much growth is still ahead. Growing demand for data center capacity linked to AI and cloud workloads can...

headline: Equinix (EQIX) Reshuffles Leadership, Is It Still 15% Below Fair Value?
summary: Equinix (EQIX) recently announced that Chief Business Officer Jon Lin will leave the company on July 18, 2026, prompting a leadership transition that spreads his responsibilities across existing senior executives. See our latest analysis for Equinix. Equinix's leadership change comes after a strong run, with the share price up 33.83% year to date and a 1 year total shareholder return of 36.60%. However, the 90 day share price return declined 4.51%, suggesting some momentum has cooled. If you...
